data.title: Change _compute_size_action() in classifier: reject->warn + SIZE_WARNING stderr
data.description:
## What

Modify `_compute_size_action()` in `plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh` so that diffs ≥600 lines emit `warn` (not `reject`) and write `SIZE_WARNING: <count>` to stderr.

## testing_mode: UPDATE

## TDD Requirement

Task 1 must be committed first (RED tests exist). This task turns those tests GREEN:
- `test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600` must pass: classifier emits `warn`
- `test_classifier_size_warning_stderr_at_600` must pass: classifier emits `SIZE_WARNING: 600` on stderr
- `test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599` must pass: 599-line diff emits `upgrade` (boundary unchanged)

## Files to Modify

### plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh (~lines 680-681)

BEFORE:
```bash
if (( diff_size_lines >= 600 )); then
    echo "reject"
```

AFTER:
```bash
if (( diff_size_lines >= 600 )); then
    echo "SIZE_WARNING: ${diff_size_lines}" >&2
    echo "warn"
```

No other changes to this file.

## Acceptance Criteria

**Universal**
- [ ] Tests pass
  Verify: `bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | tail -5`
- [ ] Lint/format clean
  Verify: `make lint 2>&1 | tail -3`

**Task-specific**
- [ ] Classifier emits `warn` for 600-line diff (not `reject`)
  Verify: `echo 'reject' | grep -q 'reject' && echo FAIL || echo PASS` — i.e., run `bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh test_classifier_size_action_warn_at_600 2>&1 | grep -E 'PASS|FAIL'`
- [ ] Classifier emits SIZE_WARNING to stderr for 600-line diff
  Verify: `bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh test_classifier_size_warning_stderr_at_600 2>&1 | grep PASS`
- [ ] 599-line diff still produces `upgrade` (boundary regression guard)
  Verify: `bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh test_classifier_size_action_upgrade_at_599 2>&1 | grep PASS`
- [ ] No `echo "reject"` in _compute_size_action() function
  Verify: `awk '/^_compute_size_action/,/^}/' plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh | grep -c '"reject"' | grep -q '^0$' && echo PASS`
